title: BitJson
description: JSON schema for the BitJson interface and related types.

JsonText.description: A text value: either a plain string or a TextAst (array of TextNode).

JsonTextOrUnknown.description: JsonText or an arbitrary JSON body.

BodyBitsJson.description: A map of placeholder keys to body bit objects.

BodyBitJson.description: A body bit: TextNode, Gap, Mark, Select, or Highlight.

ResourceJson.description: A resource wrapper - one of many resource types discriminated by 'type'.
